description_long: This is a modern, boxy house surrounded by lush, flowering trees with pink and green foliage. The house features a flat roof and a clean, white facade, accented by large windows and minimalistic wooden doors. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a stepped effect. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is simple, with a single wooden door and no visible porch or overhang, blending seamlessly into the minimalist design. The surrounding trees create a natural privacy barrier and add a vibrant, organic contrast to the house's geometric lines.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalistic wooden doors, surrounded by flowering trees with pink and green foliage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof, open courtyard, and dense arrangement of flowering trees encircling the house.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large windows, and the closest tree partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the stepped two-story structure, open patio area, and more of the house's geometric lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back door, upper-level setback, and the thickest cluster of trees behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist single wooden door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade
